text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I see Mejiro Ryan in front of the stairs, trembling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, T-Trainer... I did too much weight with my leg
presses yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A-as you can see, my muscles are aching mighty
hard right now. But don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is proof that they're growing!
choice_data_list: Are you going to be okay for today's training?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! No problem! I'm just—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps due to her sore muscles, Mejiro Ryan isn't
able to get into a rhythm during her training.
